arts.ttl: Rival fans brutally mock Chelsea's 'tinpot' celebrations and accuse players of acting 'like they won the league' after their 3-1 win over champions Liverpool
arts.sum: Rival fans have brutally mocked Chelsea for their exuberant celebrations after they beat champions Liverpool to take a huge step towards securing Champions League qualification.

arts.ttl: What Ibrahima Konate did right in front of the Stamford Bridge away end after Liverpool's 3-1 loss vs Chelsea
Liverpool captain Van Dijk admits Chelsea ‘deserved’ win
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk has said Chelsea ‘deserved’ the win after beating the champions 3-1 at Stamford Bridge. Liverpool lost just the third time in the Premier League this season with the Reds second-best in the capital. Chelsea applauded Liverpool onto the pitch with a traditional guard of honour but the goodwill did not […] The post Liverpool captain Van Dijk admits Chelsea ‘deserved’ win first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea beat lacklustre Liverpool to boost Champions League hopes
arts.sum: Victory pulls Chelsea level on points with fourth-placed Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Liverpool team news: Konate + Diaz benched

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Liverpool: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates from Stamford Bridge; kick-off 4.30pm BST Live scores | How they stand | Sign up to Football Daily Get in touch! Email michael.butler@theguardian.com Full-time at the Amex: Brighton 1-1 Newcastle. A decent result for Chelsea, that, with Newcastle dropping points. Diego Gómez missed a sitter to win it for Brighton in the 95th minute. Huge news in the race for the Champions League: Newcastle have found a late equaliser at Brighton, with Alexander Isak converting a penalty kick. That game, now 1-1, is now into stoppage time and you can follow the closing moments here. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Slot Must Play 'Generational' Star v Chelsea, Chiesa's Liverpool Career is Over
arts.sum: Arne Slot must play 'generational' young star Rio Ngumoha instead of £150,000-a-week flop Federico Chiesa in Liverpool's clash with Chelsea.
